summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpenRTB 2.5/2.6 Bidder with Campaign Manager DSP. Backend API testing shows 89.3% success rate with core functionality working. Frontend UI testing shows full navigation and interaction working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: API key validation not working properly - invalid API keys still return successful bid responses instead of 401 error
critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - unauthorized SSPs can submit bid requests

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: OpenRTB 2.6 bid requests sometimes return 204 (no bid) when they should return valid bids, and test logic expects multiple status codes
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Review targeting logic for 2.6 specific fields like plcmt vs placement

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings in console about width/height being -1
Missing aria-describedby attributes in dialog components causing accessibility warnings

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with stats and real-time charts
Campaigns page shows campaign list with status badges
Creatives page displays creative cards with type icons
SSP Endpoints page with API key management works
SSP endpoint creation and API key regeneration works
Bid Logs page accessible and shows logs
Migration Matrix page shows OpenRTB field mappings
Navigation between all pages works smoothly
All CRUD operations for campaigns, creatives, and SSP endpoints
Dashboard statistics and chart data endpoints
OpenRTB 2.5 bid requests return valid bid responses

high_priority: Fix API key validation in OpenRTB bid endpoint - invalid keys should return 401 errors
Review targeting logic for OpenRTB 2.6 bid requests to ensure proper bid matching
low_priority: Add aria-describedby attributes to Dialog components for accessibility
Fix chart rendering width/height calculation warnings
Improve test assertions for bid endpoint to handle multiple valid status codes
